    AutoRewritesL2
    Level 2 of the auto-rewriter implementing most of the automated rules that where marked as non-implemented in the wiki.
    AutoRewritesL3
    Level 3 of the auto-rewriter implementing rewriting of membership in a Cartesian product.
    AutoRewritesL4
    Level 4 of the auto-rewriter implementing rewriting of equality with an empty set.

    Level 5 of the auto-rewriter.

    Implements simplification of functional images through a set in comprehension (typically a lambda).
    LocalEqRewrite
    Rewrite an identifier at a given position in the goal or in a hypothesis using the predicate given in input.

    MinMaxDefRewrites
    Rewriter for the definition of min and max.
    MultiplicationSimplifier
    Simplifies arithmetic multiplication expressions.
    PartialLambdaPatternCheck
    Framework for checking if a given expression is similar to a lambda pattern, that is looks like a tree constructed with maplet operators as internal nodes bound identifiers as leaves, which are locally bound and pairwise distinct Here, locally bound means that the de Bruijn index is less than a given constraint.
    PartitionRewriterImpl
    Automated rewriter for the Event-B sequent prover: expand the definition of a partition predicate.
    PartitionRewrites
     
    PredicateSimplifier
    Implements syntactic simplification of event-B predicates based on some simple rewrite rules.
